title: Guest creates an invoice with live preview and downloads PDF
description: Verifies a guest can complete the core invoice editor loop, see the preview and totals update, and trigger PDF download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Fill in the sender details with valid information
Fill in the client details with valid information
Fill in the invoice subject with a short value
Fill in the invoice description with a short value
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Consulting services
Fill in the line item amount with 1200
Export the invoice to PDF
Verify a PDF download is initiated

title: Export is blocked when a line item amount is blank or non-numeric
description: Verifies invalid line item amounts prevent PDF export and show a blocking validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Item with invalid amount
Fill in the line item amount with non-numeric text
Attempt to export the invoice to PDF
Verify a blocking validation error is visible and export does not proceed

title: Continue without signing in to reach the invoice editor
description: Verifies a guest can bypass authentication and reach the invoice editor successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Verify the invoice editor is displayed

title: Correcting an invalid amount enables successful export
description: Verifies fixing an invalid line item amount removes the export block and allows PDF download.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Fixable amount item
Fill in the line item amount with non-numeric text
Attempt to export the invoice to PDF
Fill in the line item amount with 99.99
Export the invoice to PDF
Verify a PDF download is initiated

title: Email/password submission leads to invoice editor
description: Verifies a user can submit email and password in the authentication modal and reach the invoice editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the authentication modal
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the credentials
Verify the invoice editor is displayed

title: Totals and preview stay consistent after editing and removing line items
description: Verifies editing amounts/descriptions and removing a line item updates totals and the live preview immediately before export.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Item 1
Fill in the line item amount with 400
Add a second line item
Fill in the second line item description with Item 2
Fill in the second line item amount with 600
Edit the second line item amount to 500
Remove the first line item
Verify the invoice total in the live preview reflects the latest line items only

title: Multiple line items update totals automatically
description: Verifies adding multiple line items recalculates totals immediately in the live preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Item A
Fill in the line item amount with 100
Add a second line item
Fill in the second line item description with Item B
Fill in the second line item amount with 250
Verify the invoice total in the live preview reflects the sum of all line items

title: Optional subject and description can be left empty without breaking preview
description: Verifies leaving optional fields empty still produces a coherent live preview and allows PDF export when required fields are valid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to continue without signing in
Fill in the sender details with valid information
Fill in the client details with valid information
Clear the invoice subject field
Clear the invoice description field
Add a line item
Fill in the line item description with Basic service
Fill in the line item amount with 50
Export the invoice to PDF
Verify a PDF download is initiated

title: Auth modal shows validation errors for malformed credentials
description: Verifies malformed email and invalid password inputs are blocked with visible validation feedback in the authentication modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the authentication modal
Fill in the email field with invalid-email-format
Fill in the password field with a short invalid password
Submit the credentials
Verify a form validation error is visible
